Xenomorphtype.RoyalEvolutionDef.label: Maternal Crest
Xenomorphtype.RoyalEvolutionDef.description: An extended crest for greater dominance over the nest.

Xenomorphtype.RoyalEvolutionDef.label: Fine Dexterity Hands
Xenomorphtype.RoyalEvolutionDef.description: A secondary pair of dextrous hands for finer manipulation.

Xenomorphtype.RoyalEvolutionDef.label: Rending Claws
Xenomorphtype.RoyalEvolutionDef.description: Sharpened claws on the primary pair of hands.

Xenomorphtype.RoyalEvolutionDef.label: Fecundity
Xenomorphtype.RoyalEvolutionDef.description: All internal organs and abdomen are altered to maximize Ovomorph Production efficiency.

Xenomorphtype.RoyalEvolutionDef.label: Gene Expression Control
Xenomorphtype.RoyalEvolutionDef.description: Unlocks the metamorphic potential in the hive. Allows the addition or removal of genes within all offspring.

Xenomorphtype.RoyalEvolutionDef.label: Meat Larder Serum
Xenomorphtype.RoyalEvolutionDef.description: A potent growth serum which hive daughters can inject into prey to promote tissue growth above all else.

Xenomorphtype.RoyalEvolutionDef.label: Cryptomechanical Circuitry
Xenomorphtype.RoyalEvolutionDef.description: The queen adapts a mechanitor chip into cryptic nerve and resin, preparing her body to command machines through alien impulse. Other mechanoid chips can later be consumed to unlock equivalent mech technology.

Xenomorphtype.RoyalEvolutionDef.label: Maternal Stature
Xenomorphtype.RoyalEvolutionDef.description: Body hypertrophies to increase stature all the better to guide the hive.

Xenomorphtype.RoyalEvolutionDef.label: Hypertrophied Ovipositor
Xenomorphtype.RoyalEvolutionDef.description: Reproductive system is shifted entirely to an extruded abdomenal sack, allows extreme ovomorph production at cost of mobility. Renders body sterile without reproductive sack

Xenomorphtype.RoyalEvolutionDef.label: Noble Stature
Xenomorphtype.RoyalEvolutionDef.description: Further growth increases mass to a truly noble stature.

Xenomorphtype.RoyalEvolutionDef.label: Scything Blades
Xenomorphtype.RoyalEvolutionDef.description: Massive Blades which replace each of the primary hands entirely.

Xenomorphtype.RoyalEvolutionDef.label: Genetic Storage
Xenomorphtype.RoyalEvolutionDef.description: Unlocks the ability to store genes in specially altered Ovomorphs.

Xenomorphtype.RoyalEvolutionDef.label: mutation expression
Xenomorphtype.RoyalEvolutionDef.description: Unlocks the ability to access genes on cryptimorph mutated organisms and enhance or suppress their expression.

Xenomorphtype.RoyalEvolutionDef.label: novel gene expression
Xenomorphtype.RoyalEvolutionDef.description: Unlocks the ability to access novel cryptimorph genes.

Xenomorphtype.RoyalEvolutionDef.label: Jelly Wells
Xenomorphtype.RoyalEvolutionDef.description: Unlocks the ability to merge a hive daughter with a Larder in order to become a means of mass producing Resinous Jelly.

Xenomorphtype.RoyalEvolutionDef.label: Electro Metabolic Catalyst
Xenomorphtype.RoyalEvolutionDef.description: Cryptic tissues learn to bleed usable current into allied mechanoids at great metabolic cost.

Xenomorphtype.RoyalEvolutionDef.label: Mechanoid Gestation
Xenomorphtype.RoyalEvolutionDef.description: The queen can begin gestating small mechanoids from swallowed metal, components, slag and dead mechanoid matter. This advancement is inert without a mechlink.

Xenomorphtype.RoyalEvolutionDef.label: Signal Amplifying Antenna
Xenomorphtype.RoyalEvolutionDef.description: Metallic nerves thread through the crest, making the queen a living beacon for mechanoid signals and future raid-calling mechanics. This advancement is inert without a mechlink.

Xenomorphtype.RoyalEvolutionDef.label: Royal Stature
Xenomorphtype.RoyalEvolutionDef.description: Growth reaches royal size.

Xenomorphtype.RoyalEvolutionDef.label: Genetic Digestion
Xenomorphtype.RoyalEvolutionDef.description: Unlocks the ability to extract genes from fresh corpses.

Xenomorphtype.RoyalEvolutionDef.label: Mechanoid Subversion
Xenomorphtype.RoyalEvolutionDef.description: Specialized ovamorphs can be prepared for later hijacker mechanics, letting the hive corrupt artificial life and turn hostile mechanoid systems against themselves. This advancement is inert without a mechlink.

Xenomorphtype.RoyalEvolutionDef.label: Mechanitor Array
Xenomorphtype.RoyalEvolutionDef.description: The antenna blossoms into a crown-array of cryptic receivers, preparing body-size scaling bandwidth and stronger mechanoid summons. This advancement is inert without a mechlink.

Xenomorphtype.RoyalEvolutionDef.label: Mechanoid Synthesis
Xenomorphtype.RoyalEvolutionDef.description: The queen's gestation tissues can later synthesize larger and more advanced mechanoids unlocked by mech technology, with mass and movement costs handled by future mechanics. This advancement is inert without a mechlink.

Xenomorphtype.RoyalEvolutionDef.label: Imperial Stature
Xenomorphtype.RoyalEvolutionDef.description: The penultimate expression of form, body grows to an astounding size.

Xenomorphtype.RoyalEvolutionDef.label: Genetic Self Expression
Xenomorphtype.RoyalEvolutionDef.description: Unlocks the ability to alter one's own genes.

Xenomorphtype.RoyalEvolutionDef.label: Signal Boosting Pylon
Xenomorphtype.RoyalEvolutionDef.description: The royal can later lay ovamorphs that grow into bandwidth-amplifying pylons at mechanoid material cost. This advancement is inert without a mechlink.

Xenomorphtype.RoyalEvolutionDef.label: Mechanoid Dominion
Xenomorphtype.RoyalEvolutionDef.description: The queen becomes a sovereign signal over artificial organisms, overwhelming all protections and defenses. This advancement is inert without a mechlink.
